title: Spanish Flatbread with Vegetable Tapenade
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make flatbread topped with a delicious vegetable tapenade made with fresh vegetables and spices.
instructions: Arrange flatbread on a baking sheet.
In a blender or food processor, combine chopped vegetables, glassy jelly, and catalan spices. Blend until smooth.
Spread the vegetable tapenade over the flatbread.
Drizzle olive oil over the tapenade.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the flatbread is crispy and the tapenade is heated through.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
